violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the restroom were lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the retail reach-in refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025

The doors to the outside (front doors and back door), are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025
Bottled beverages were observed stored on the floor in the storage area and retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Staff informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025
Exterior of building on the right side lawn has an accumulation of litter. Area to be maintained to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025
Restroom lights were not functional during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025
